cn.description:
PowNap

Wake up when your body is ready.

PowNap is an intelligent power-nap timer for Apple Watch.

Instead of rigid time rules, PowNap uses your heart rate to detect recovery and wake you at the right moment.

You start the nap.
PowNap handles detection and wake-up — based on your current physiology.

---

Two Modes

Power Nap
15, 20, or 25 minutes.
- May end earlier if your body recovers sooner
- Ends at the selected time at the latest

Heart-rate detection with a fixed upper limit.

Infinity Nap
No time limit.
- Ends when your body shows signs of recovery or light sleep
- Ideal for stress, exhaustion, or when you don’t want a fixed duration

Not designed for deep sleep, but for short, measurable recovery.
Depending on your heart rate, this may happen after 10–15 minutes — or later.

---

Calm. Precise. Distraction-free.
- Detects relaxation and falling asleep via heart rate
- Wakes you with gentle vibration
- No countdown pressure, no unnecessary sound
- Subtle progress indicators instead of a classic timer
- Runs fully offline on your Apple Watch

Tap “Start” — PowNap takes care of the rest.

---

Adjustable (Optional)
- Vibration: Soft, Medium, Strong, or Increasing
- Heart-rate threshold:
- automatically adjusted to your resting heart rate
- or manually set as a percentage

Behavior may vary slightly depending on your daily condition.

---

Private & Local
- One-time purchase — no subscription
- No ads, no account, no tracking
- No cloud

All processing happens locally on your watch.
Saving naps to Apple Health is optional.

For heart-rate detection, Health permissions (Workout, Heart Rate, Sleep) are required.
Without them, heart-rate-based nap control is not available.

---

Important Notes
- PowNap is not a medical device
- For continuous heart-rate tracking, PowNap uses a “Mind & Body” workout session (required by watchOS)

As a result, exercise minutes are counted and Activity Rings are affected.
This behavior is system-controlled and cannot be undone.

---

Buy once.
No conditions.
Just calm, focused recovery.

---

Short FAQ

Why does PowNap start a workout?
- watchOS only allows continuous heart-rate tracking during an active workout.

Does PowNap fake activity or calories?
- No. All values come directly from watchOS.

Does PowNap affect Activity Rings?
- Yes, while the workout is active — this is system behavior.

Infinity = deep sleep?
- No. Infinity Nap is for short recovery, not deep or long sleep.

---

Apple Watch Compatibility

Requires Apple Watch Series 4 or newer (including SE).
Apple Watch Series 3 and earlier are not supported.

cn.description:
【*】开发组的话
- 厌倦了会员VIP、卡牌十连抽？玩够了打卡领体力，无尽充MONEY的游戏？在《地牢求生》的世界不需要这些！
- 即使不充一块钱，你一样可以完整体验50+小时紧张刺激的地牢旅程。
- 在这里，你更需要的是技巧、策略和耐心而不是比谁更会氪金。
- 横版Roguelike玩法，非胜即死的体验。

【*】故事起源
故事发生在一座以矿产闻名的边境小城-黑霾城，善与恶互相交织在其中，形成微妙的平衡。随着前任领主的神秘失踪，这里脆弱的平衡终于被打破。而你，罗伊德大人，已被国王选中，前去黑霾城接替领主之位，并彻查事件的来龙去脉。

【*】职业 & 战斗
- 9大职业，每种职业4个独具特色的技能，菜刀队？三奶队？收割队？任你组合。
- 回合制加上前后排站位系统，让你尽情发挥机智策略。
- 独特的英雄特质设定，你的英雄们不仅会染上坏毛病，甚至会离家出走，战斗之余还得好好照顾他们哟。

【*】怪物 & 地图
- 剧情关卡与随机地图相结合，你既可以紧跟剧情，探索故事脉络，也可以无脑刷刷刷。
- 这里的小怪不只会傻乎乎得担当木桩或沙袋，它们不仅技能多变，还会携带各种能力特质（吸血、牺牲、迅捷、野性狂暴、反弹伤害、石头皮肤、不死之身...），一不留神就能让你团灭。
- 地图中还会随机遭遇各种稀有精英怪，隐藏BOSS怪，只要你敢挑战，稀有宝物、套装任你收集。

【*】联系我们
如果您在游戏体验的过程中遇到了什么不便，或是对游戏有什么意见、建议、吐槽、反馈，欢迎联系我们，我们一定会尽快得答复。

cn.description:
Golden hour happens every single day. Most people miss it. Solar Arc makes sure you do not.

- Chasing golden hour for a photo? Know the exact minute it starts.
- Planning a sunrise hike? See the best trail windows at a glance.
- Wondering when the moon rises tonight? It is right there on your screen.

SolarArc is a sun and moon tracker that feels like looking out the window. Every view shifts with the real sky — warm when the light is warm, dark when the sky is dark. It is not a data app you check. It is a sky app you feel.

ARC MODE 

The sun and moon traced across your sky in real time. Watch them rise, climb, and fall against a live gradient that shifts with the actual light outside your window. View the sun alone, the moon alone, or both together.

GRADIENT MODE

Your entire day, painted in one line. Dawn amber bleeds into midday blue, then sunset orange, then deep navy night. Golden hour glows. Blue hour cools. You do not need to read a single number — just look at the color and know where you are in the day.

LUNAR TRACKING

Know when to look up. SolarArc renders tonight's moon with the correct phase shape on the arc. Plan around full moons. Catch a crescent at dusk. Know exactly how dark the sky will be.

52-WEEK FORECAST

What will golden hour look like three Saturdays from now? How much daylight will you have on that hiking trip in April? Pick any date in the next year and see the full picture — sun, moon, and light — before you commit.

FIVE WAYS TO USE THE SKY

Photography — Golden hour and blue hour, down to the minute. Stop guessing when to shoot.
Hiking — Best trail windows and how much daylight is left. Know when to turn around.
Screens — A screen curfew that follows the sun. Wind down with the sky, not against it.
Gardening — When to water, when to protect, and how many sun hours your plants get today.
Stargazing — When true darkness begins. The best window to see everything above you.

FEATURES

- Live gradient line and arc visualizations
- Sun view, moon view, or dual view
- Golden hour and blue hour timing
- Moonrise, moonset, phase, and illumination
- 52-week forecast for any date
- Five activity modes
- Medium and large home screen widgets
- Notifications for sunrise, sunset, and golden hour
- Multi-location with automatic timezone handling
- Built on NOAA solar and Meeus lunar algorithms
- Fully offline. No tracking. No account required.

WHAT IS GOLDEN HOUR?

Golden hour is the short window after sunrise and before sunset when the light turns soft, warm, and directional. Photographers chase it. Hikers love it. Solar Arc tells you exactly when it happens, wherever you are.

--

One purchase. No subscription. No ads.
Yours forever.

Questions or ideas? hello@spruzzolabs.com

hk.description:
在榮獲了160多個獎項和提名，其中涵蓋了英國電影學院獎(BAFTA)之際，《神界：原罪2》(Divinity: Original Sin 2)終於登陸了Mac平臺！在一個充滿邪惡、被諸神遺棄的世界中，建立一支隊伍，體驗真正的多線性遊戲玩法。每個玩家，都會擁有自己獨特的故事。你的選擇非常重要，所以一定要明智地做出選擇，要知道，你們之間只有一個人可以成為新的神！

警告：在購買遊戲前，請確認您的機器是否符合以下配置要求。

特色：
-從五個夢幻般的種族中挑選一個來構造你的角色，每個種族都有自己的獨特能力和劇情故事：精靈、矮人、蜥蜴人、人類和亡靈。
-探索一個被戰利品、寶藏、強大的力量和故事所充滿的廣袤的世界，這個世界中還充滿了令人驚奇的分支劇情。
-以自然元素為特色的回合式戰鬥：將烈焰、大地、冰霜、大氣和其他元素結合起來，對抗你的敵人。
-與動物和鬼魂交談，獲得關於世界及其秘密的獨特見解。
-最多4人在線或2人分屏合作。
-啟動遊戲時按住CMD鍵即可進行語言及遊戲選項配置。

如何確認：要確認你的Mac型號，在Apple菜單中選擇“About This Mac（關於本機）”即可。

OS系統:

- 推薦 macOS 10.14.2 Mojave (或更高版本) 
- 支持 macOS 10.13.6 High Sierra

支持硬件：

- MacBook Pro: 2016年年底後發售的所有型號
- MacBook Air: 2017年年中後發售的所有型號
- iMac: 2014年後發售的所有支持Radeon圖像的型號，以及2017年年中後發售的所有iMac型號
- Mac Pro:  2019年起發售的所有型號
- Mac mini: 2018年起發售的所有型號
- eGPU: 所有基於 AMD GPU的官方eGPU型號模組


HDR生效條件:

- macOS 10.14.2 或更高版本
- 任意達到500尼特值並支持自動亮度調整的iMac顯示

hk.description:
建立足夠強大的骰子組合，淨化阿斯特賴亞失控的腐敗並拯救星系。

特色
• 獨特的雙重「傷害」系統：腐化與淨化——《阿斯特賴亞》有一種新型的「傷害」系統。淨化可以用來傷害敵人或治療自己，而腐化可以用來傷害自己或治療敵人。使用淨化來安撫敵人，或腐化自己來釋放力量以扭轉戰局。
• 動態生命條系統——將技能附加到生命條後，可以使用腐化來啟用這些技能並釋放強大的能力。但是要小心，如果接受了太多腐敗，你可能會被會被它消耗殆盡。
• 不是紙牌，是骰子！——建立適合你遊戲風格的骰子組合。從超過350顆骰子和三種骰子類型中選擇：可靠安全、完美平衡或強大有風險。以高風險、高報酬為核心設計的骰子型系統。
• 自訂骰子——編輯骰子面，以新動作來創造自己的命運，讓強大結果的機率對自己有利。
• 在六位勇敢神諭者中選擇——每一位都擁有自己獨特的骰子組合、能力與玩法風格。從靈巧的施法者到野蠻的狂戰士，無論是喜歡讓對手挨轟求饒，還是想以智取勝，總有一位適合你。
• 發現超過170種修改賜福——為神諭者注入獨特的被動技，產生強大的效果，將改變你的基本策略。在恆星賜福（力量較弱的被動效果）或黑洞賜福（具有不利條件的強大被動效果）之間進行選擇。

advisories: 偶爾/輕度的暴力卡通或幻想
偶爾/輕度的恐怖或驚嚇題材

hk.description:
Escape your childhood fears.

First available on PC and consoles, the horror adventure tale Little Nightmares is available on mobile!
 Immerse yourself in Little Nightmares, a dark whimsical tale that will confront you with your childhood fears!
Help Six escape The Maw – a vast, mysterious vessel inhabited by corrupted souls looking for their next meal.
As you progress on your journey, explore the most disturbing dollhouse offering a prison to escape from and a playground full of secrets to discover.
Reconnect with your inner child to unleash your imagination and find the way out!
Little Nightmares features a subtle mix of action and puzzle-platformer mechanics rooted in an eerie artistic direction and creepy sound design.
Sneak your way out of the Maw’s dreary maze and run from its corrupted inhabitants to escape your childhood fears. 

FEATURES

- Tiptoe your way through a dark and thrilling adventure
- Rediscover your childhood fears inside a haunting vessel and escape its eerie inhabitants
- Climb, crawl and hide through nightmarish environments to solve tricky platform puzzles
- Immerse yourself in the Maw through its creepy sound design

CAREFULLY REDESIGNED FOR MOBILE

- Revamped interface
- Game Center achievements
- Compatible with MFi controllers

If you run into a problem, please contact us at https://playdigious.helpshift.com/hc/en/12-playdigious/ with as much information as possible on the issue.

hk.description:
Golden hour happens every single day. Most people miss it. Solar Arc makes sure you do not.

- Chasing golden hour for a photo? Know the exact minute it starts.
- Planning a sunrise hike? See the best trail windows at a glance.
- Wondering when the moon rises tonight? It is right there on your screen.

SolarArc is a sun and moon tracker that feels like looking out the window. Every view shifts with the real sky — warm when the light is warm, dark when the sky is dark. It is not a data app you check. It is a sky app you feel.

ARC MODE 

The sun and moon traced across your sky in real time. Watch them rise, climb, and fall against a live gradient that shifts with the actual light outside your window. View the sun alone, the moon alone, or both together.

GRADIENT MODE

Your entire day, painted in one line. Dawn amber bleeds into midday blue, then sunset orange, then deep navy night. Golden hour glows. Blue hour cools. You do not need to read a single number — just look at the color and know where you are in the day.

LUNAR TRACKING

Know when to look up. SolarArc renders tonight's moon with the correct phase shape on the arc. Plan around full moons. Catch a crescent at dusk. Know exactly how dark the sky will be.

52-WEEK FORECAST

What will golden hour look like three Saturdays from now? How much daylight will you have on that hiking trip in April? Pick any date in the next year and see the full picture — sun, moon, and light — before you commit.

FIVE WAYS TO USE THE SKY

Photography — Golden hour and blue hour, down to the minute. Stop guessing when to shoot.
Hiking — Best trail windows and how much daylight is left. Know when to turn around.
Screens — A screen curfew that follows the sun. Wind down with the sky, not against it.
Gardening — When to water, when to protect, and how many sun hours your plants get today.
Stargazing — When true darkness begins. The best window to see everything above you.

FEATURES

- Live gradient line and arc visualizations
- Sun view, moon view, or dual view
- Golden hour and blue hour timing
- Moonrise, moonset, phase, and illumination
- 52-week forecast for any date
- Five activity modes
- Medium and large home screen widgets
- Notifications for sunrise, sunset, and golden hour
- Multi-location with automatic timezone handling
- Built on NOAA solar and Meeus lunar algorithms
- Fully offline. No tracking. No account required.

WHAT IS GOLDEN HOUR?

Golden hour is the short window after sunrise and before sunset when the light turns soft, warm, and directional. Photographers chase it. Hikers love it. Solar Arc tells you exactly when it happens, wherever you are.

--

One purchase. No subscription. No ads.
Yours forever.

Questions or ideas? hello@spruzzolabs.com

hk.description:

*** Apple App of the Week *** 2000多萬使用者 *** 1000多家小企業 ***

“下一次出差時別忘了下載一個Genius Scan，可以給自己和會計部門帶來很大方便。” - AppPicker.com

“相機應用不適合對文字進行近距離掃描，但Genius Scan可以辦到。” - 衛報

建立足夠強大的骰子組合，淨化阿斯特賴亞失控的腐敗並拯救星系。

特色
• 獨特的雙重「傷害」系統：腐化與淨化——《阿斯特賴亞》有一種新型的「傷害」系統。淨化可以用來傷害敵人或治療自己，而腐化可以用來傷害自己或治療敵人。使用淨化來安撫敵人，或腐化自己來釋放力量以扭轉戰局。
• 動態生命條系統——將技能附加到生命條後，可以使用腐化來啟用這些技能並釋放強大的能力。但是要小心，如果接受了太多腐敗，你可能會被會被它消耗殆盡。
• 不是紙牌，是骰子！——建立適合你遊戲風格的骰子組合。從超過350顆骰子和三種骰子類型中選擇：可靠安全、完美平衡或強大有風險。以高風險、高報酬為核心設計的骰子型系統。
• 自訂骰子——編輯骰子面，以新動作來創造自己的命運，讓強大結果的機率對自己有利。
• 在六位勇敢神諭者中選擇——每一位都擁有自己獨特的骰子組合、能力與玩法風格。從靈巧的施法者到野蠻的狂戰士，無論是喜歡讓對手挨轟求饒，還是想以智取勝，總有一位適合你。
• 發現超過170種修改賜福——為神諭者注入獨特的被動技，產生強大的效果，將改變你的基本策略。在恆星賜福（力量較弱的被動效果）或黑洞賜福（具有不利條件的強大被動效果）之間進行選擇。

mo.description:
PowNap

Wake up when your body is ready.

PowNap is an intelligent power-nap timer for Apple Watch.

Instead of rigid time rules, PowNap uses your heart rate to detect recovery and wake you at the right moment.

You start the nap.
PowNap handles detection and wake-up — based on your current physiology.

---

Two Modes

Power Nap
15, 20, or 25 minutes.
- May end earlier if your body recovers sooner
- Ends at the selected time at the latest

Heart-rate detection with a fixed upper limit.

Infinity Nap
No time limit.
- Ends when your body shows signs of recovery or light sleep
- Ideal for stress, exhaustion, or when you don’t want a fixed duration

Not designed for deep sleep, but for short, measurable recovery.
Depending on your heart rate, this may happen after 10–15 minutes — or later.

---

Calm. Precise. Distraction-free.
- Detects relaxation and falling asleep via heart rate
- Wakes you with gentle vibration
- No countdown pressure, no unnecessary sound
- Subtle progress indicators instead of a classic timer
- Runs fully offline on your Apple Watch

Tap “Start” — PowNap takes care of the rest.

---

Adjustable (Optional)
- Vibration: Soft, Medium, Strong, or Increasing
- Heart-rate threshold:
- automatically adjusted to your resting heart rate
- or manually set as a percentage

Behavior may vary slightly depending on your daily condition.

---

Private & Local
- One-time purchase — no subscription
- No ads, no account, no tracking
- No cloud

All processing happens locally on your watch.
Saving naps to Apple Health is optional.

For heart-rate detection, Health permissions (Workout, Heart Rate, Sleep) are required.
Without them, heart-rate-based nap control is not available.

---

Important Notes
- PowNap is not a medical device
- For continuous heart-rate tracking, PowNap uses a “Mind & Body” workout session (required by watchOS)

As a result, exercise minutes are counted and Activity Rings are affected.
This behavior is system-controlled and cannot be undone.

---

Buy once.
No conditions.
Just calm, focused recovery.

---

Short FAQ

Why does PowNap start a workout?
- watchOS only allows continuous heart-rate tracking during an active workout.

Does PowNap fake activity or calories?
- No. All values come directly from watchOS.

Does PowNap affect Activity Rings?
- Yes, while the workout is active — this is system behavior.

Infinity = deep sleep?
- No. Infinity Nap is for short recovery, not deep or long sleep.

---

Apple Watch Compatibility

Requires Apple Watch Series 4 or newer (including SE).
Apple Watch Series 3 and earlier are not supported.

【*】職業 & 戰鬥

mo.description:
Golden hour happens every single day. Most people miss it. Solar Arc makes sure you do not.

- Chasing golden hour for a photo? Know the exact minute it starts.
- Planning a sunrise hike? See the best trail windows at a glance.
- Wondering when the moon rises tonight? It is right there on your screen.

SolarArc is a sun and moon tracker that feels like looking out the window. Every view shifts with the real sky — warm when the light is warm, dark when the sky is dark. It is not a data app you check. It is a sky app you feel.

ARC MODE 

The sun and moon traced across your sky in real time. Watch them rise, climb, and fall against a live gradient that shifts with the actual light outside your window. View the sun alone, the moon alone, or both together.

GRADIENT MODE

Your entire day, painted in one line. Dawn amber bleeds into midday blue, then sunset orange, then deep navy night. Golden hour glows. Blue hour cools. You do not need to read a single number — just look at the color and know where you are in the day.

LUNAR TRACKING

Know when to look up. SolarArc renders tonight's moon with the correct phase shape on the arc. Plan around full moons. Catch a crescent at dusk. Know exactly how dark the sky will be.

52-WEEK FORECAST

What will golden hour look like three Saturdays from now? How much daylight will you have on that hiking trip in April? Pick any date in the next year and see the full picture — sun, moon, and light — before you commit.

FIVE WAYS TO USE THE SKY

Photography — Golden hour and blue hour, down to the minute. Stop guessing when to shoot.
Hiking — Best trail windows and how much daylight is left. Know when to turn around.
Screens — A screen curfew that follows the sun. Wind down with the sky, not against it.
Gardening — When to water, when to protect, and how many sun hours your plants get today.
Stargazing — When true darkness begins. The best window to see everything above you.

FEATURES

- Live gradient line and arc visualizations
- Sun view, moon view, or dual view
- Golden hour and blue hour timing
- Moonrise, moonset, phase, and illumination
- 52-week forecast for any date
- Five activity modes
- Medium and large home screen widgets
- Notifications for sunrise, sunset, and golden hour
- Multi-location with automatic timezone handling
- Built on NOAA solar and Meeus lunar algorithms
- Fully offline. No tracking. No account required.

WHAT IS GOLDEN HOUR?

Golden hour is the short window after sunrise and before sunset when the light turns soft, warm, and directional. Photographers chase it. Hikers love it. Solar Arc tells you exactly when it happens, wherever you are.

--

One purchase. No subscription. No ads.
Yours forever.

Questions or ideas? hello@spruzzolabs.com

tw.description:
建立足夠強大的骰子組合，淨化阿斯特賴亞失控的腐敗並拯救星系。

特色
• 獨特的雙重「傷害」系統：腐化與淨化——《阿斯特賴亞》有一種新型的「傷害」系統。淨化可以用來傷害敵人或治療自己，而腐化可以用來傷害自己或治療敵人。使用淨化來安撫敵人，或腐化自己來釋放力量以扭轉戰局。
• 動態生命條系統——將技能附加到生命條後，可以使用腐化來啟用這些技能並釋放強大的能力。但是要小心，如果接受了太多腐敗，你可能會被會被它消耗殆盡。
• 不是紙牌，是骰子！——建立適合你遊戲風格的骰子組合。從超過350顆骰子和三種骰子類型中選擇：可靠安全、完美平衡或強大有風險。以高風險、高報酬為核心設計的骰子型系統。
• 自訂骰子——編輯骰子面，以新動作來創造自己的命運，讓強大結果的機率對自己有利。
• 在六位勇敢神諭者中選擇——每一位都擁有自己獨特的骰子組合、能力與玩法風格。從靈巧的施法者到野蠻的狂戰士，無論是喜歡讓對手挨轟求饒，還是想以智取勝，總有一位適合你。
• 發現超過170種修改賜福——為神諭者注入獨特的被動技，產生強大的效果，將改變你的基本策略。在恆星賜福（力量較弱的被動效果）或黑洞賜福（具有不利條件的強大被動效果）之間進行選擇。

在榮獲了160多個獎項和提名，其中涵蓋了英國電影學院獎(BAFTA)之際，《神界：原罪2》(Divinity: Original Sin 2)終於登陸了Mac平臺！在一個充滿邪惡、被諸神遺棄的世界中，建立一支隊伍，體驗真正的多線性遊戲玩法。每個玩家，都會擁有自己獨特的故事。你的選擇非常重要，所以一定要明智地做出選擇，要知道，你們之間只有一個人可以成為新的神！

警告：在購買遊戲前，請確認您的機器是否符合以下配置要求。

特色：
-從五個夢幻般的種族中挑選一個來構造你的角色，每個種族都有自己的獨特能力和劇情故事：精靈、矮人、蜥蜴人、人類和亡靈。
-探索一個被戰利品、寶藏、強大的力量和故事所充滿的廣袤的世界，這個世界中還充滿了令人驚奇的分支劇情。
-以自然元素為特色的回合式戰鬥：將烈焰、大地、冰霜、大氣和其他元素結合起來，對抗你的敵人。
-與動物和鬼魂交談，獲得關於世界及其秘密的獨特見解。
-最多4人在線或2人分屏合作。
-啟動遊戲時按住CMD鍵即可進行語言及遊戲選項配置。

tw.description:
PowNap

Wake up when your body is ready.

PowNap is an intelligent power-nap timer for Apple Watch.

Instead of rigid time rules, PowNap uses your heart rate to detect recovery and wake you at the right moment.

You start the nap.
PowNap handles detection and wake-up — based on your current physiology.

---

Two Modes

Power Nap
15, 20, or 25 minutes.
- May end earlier if your body recovers sooner
- Ends at the selected time at the latest

Heart-rate detection with a fixed upper limit.

Infinity Nap
No time limit.
- Ends when your body shows signs of recovery or light sleep
- Ideal for stress, exhaustion, or when you don’t want a fixed duration

Not designed for deep sleep, but for short, measurable recovery.
Depending on your heart rate, this may happen after 10–15 minutes — or later.

---

Calm. Precise. Distraction-free.
- Detects relaxation and falling asleep via heart rate
- Wakes you with gentle vibration
- No countdown pressure, no unnecessary sound
- Subtle progress indicators instead of a classic timer
- Runs fully offline on your Apple Watch

Tap “Start” — PowNap takes care of the rest.

---

Adjustable (Optional)
- Vibration: Soft, Medium, Strong, or Increasing
- Heart-rate threshold:
- automatically adjusted to your resting heart rate
- or manually set as a percentage

Behavior may vary slightly depending on your daily condition.

---

Private & Local
- One-time purchase — no subscription
- No ads, no account, no tracking
- No cloud

All processing happens locally on your watch.
Saving naps to Apple Health is optional.

For heart-rate detection, Health permissions (Workout, Heart Rate, Sleep) are required.
Without them, heart-rate-based nap control is not available.

---

Important Notes
- PowNap is not a medical device
- For continuous heart-rate tracking, PowNap uses a “Mind & Body” workout session (required by watchOS)

As a result, exercise minutes are counted and Activity Rings are affected.
This behavior is system-controlled and cannot be undone.

---

Buy once.
No conditions.
Just calm, focused recovery.

---

Short FAQ

Why does PowNap start a workout?
- watchOS only allows continuous heart-rate tracking during an active workout.

Does PowNap fake activity or calories?
- No. All values come directly from watchOS.

Does PowNap affect Activity Rings?
- Yes, while the workout is active — this is system behavior.

Infinity = deep sleep?
- No. Infinity Nap is for short recovery, not deep or long sleep.

---

Apple Watch Compatibility

Requires Apple Watch Series 4 or newer (including SE).
Apple Watch Series 3 and earlier are not supported.

us.description:
Astrea is a DICE-deck-building roguelike that flips the script on deckbuilders by using dice instead of cards and an unique dual “damage” system: Purification vs Corruption.

Features

• Unique dual “damage” system: Purification vs Corruption - In Astrea there is a new type of “damage” system. Purification can be used to damage enemies or heal yourself. On the other hand, corruption can be used to damage yourself or heal the enemies. Pacify enemies through Purification, or Corrupt yourself to unleash abilities that help tip the scales.
• Dynamic Health Bar system - With skills attached to your health bar, you can take Corruption to enable these skills and unleash powerful abilities. But be careful, if you take too much Corruption you will be consumed by it.
• Not cards, but dice! - Build a dice pool that fits your playstyle. Choose from over 350 dice and three dice types; reliably safe, perfectly balanced, or powerfully risky. A dice type system designed with high-risk, high-reward in its core.
• Customize your dice - Forge your fate by editing die faces with new actions, tipping the odds of powerful results into your favor.
• Choose from Six Brave Oracles - Each possessing their own unique dice sets, abilities, and playstyles. From ingenious spellcasters to brutish berserkers, whether you like beating the opponent into submission or outsmarting them with clever plays, there’s an oracle for you.
• Uncover over 170 modifying Blessings - Imbue your Oracle with unique passives yielding potent effects that changes up your fundamental tactics. Choose between Star Blessings, passive effects with lower power, or Black Hole Blessings, powerful passive effects with a drawback.

us.description:
PowNap

Wake up when your body is ready.

PowNap is an intelligent power-nap timer for Apple Watch.

Instead of rigid time rules, PowNap uses your heart rate to detect recovery and wake you at the right moment.

You start the nap.
PowNap handles detection and wake-up — based on your current physiology.

---

Two Modes

Power Nap
15, 20, or 25 minutes.
- May end earlier if your body recovers sooner
- Ends at the selected time at the latest

Heart-rate detection with a fixed upper limit.

Infinity Nap
No time limit.
- Ends when your body shows signs of recovery or light sleep
- Ideal for stress, exhaustion, or when you don’t want a fixed duration

Not designed for deep sleep, but for short, measurable recovery.
Depending on your heart rate, this may happen after 10–15 minutes — or later.

---

Calm. Precise. Distraction-free.
- Detects relaxation and falling asleep via heart rate
- Wakes you with gentle vibration
- No countdown pressure, no unnecessary sound
- Subtle progress indicators instead of a classic timer
- Runs fully offline on your Apple Watch

Tap “Start” — PowNap takes care of the rest.

---

Adjustable (Optional)
- Vibration: Soft, Medium, Strong, or Increasing
- Heart-rate threshold:
- automatically adjusted to your resting heart rate
- or manually set as a percentage

Behavior may vary slightly depending on your daily condition.

---

Private & Local
- One-time purchase — no subscription
- No ads, no account, no tracking
- No cloud

All processing happens locally on your watch.
Saving naps to Apple Health is optional.

For heart-rate detection, Health permissions (Workout, Heart Rate, Sleep) are required.
Without them, heart-rate-based nap control is not available.

---

Important Notes
- PowNap is not a medical device
- For continuous heart-rate tracking, PowNap uses a “Mind & Body” workout session (required by watchOS)

As a result, exercise minutes are counted and Activity Rings are affected.
This behavior is system-controlled and cannot be undone.

---

Buy once.
No conditions.
Just calm, focused recovery.

---

Short FAQ

Why does PowNap start a workout?
- watchOS only allows continuous heart-rate tracking during an active workout.

Does PowNap fake activity or calories?
- No. All values come directly from watchOS.

Does PowNap affect Activity Rings?
- Yes, while the workout is active — this is system behavior.

Infinity = deep sleep?
- No. Infinity Nap is for short recovery, not deep or long sleep.

---

Apple Watch Compatibility

Requires Apple Watch Series 4 or newer (including SE).
Apple Watch Series 3 and earlier are not supported.

us.description:
Golden hour happens every single day. Most people miss it. Solar Arc makes sure you do not.

- Chasing golden hour for a photo? Know the exact minute it starts.
- Planning a sunrise hike? See the best trail windows at a glance.
- Wondering when the moon rises tonight? It is right there on your screen.

SolarArc is a sun and moon tracker that feels like looking out the window. Every view shifts with the real sky — warm when the light is warm, dark when the sky is dark. It is not a data app you check. It is a sky app you feel.

ARC MODE 

The sun and moon traced across your sky in real time. Watch them rise, climb, and fall against a live gradient that shifts with the actual light outside your window. View the sun alone, the moon alone, or both together.

GRADIENT MODE

Your entire day, painted in one line. Dawn amber bleeds into midday blue, then sunset orange, then deep navy night. Golden hour glows. Blue hour cools. You do not need to read a single number — just look at the color and know where you are in the day.

LUNAR TRACKING

Know when to look up. SolarArc renders tonight's moon with the correct phase shape on the arc. Plan around full moons. Catch a crescent at dusk. Know exactly how dark the sky will be.

52-WEEK FORECAST

What will golden hour look like three Saturdays from now? How much daylight will you have on that hiking trip in April? Pick any date in the next year and see the full picture — sun, moon, and light — before you commit.

FIVE WAYS TO USE THE SKY

Photography — Golden hour and blue hour, down to the minute. Stop guessing when to shoot.
Hiking — Best trail windows and how much daylight is left. Know when to turn around.
Screens — A screen curfew that follows the sun. Wind down with the sky, not against it.
Gardening — When to water, when to protect, and how many sun hours your plants get today.
Stargazing — When true darkness begins. The best window to see everything above you.

FEATURES

- Live gradient line and arc visualizations
- Sun view, moon view, or dual view
- Golden hour and blue hour timing
- Moonrise, moonset, phase, and illumination
- 52-week forecast for any date
- Five activity modes
- Medium and large home screen widgets
- Notifications for sunrise, sunset, and golden hour
- Multi-location with automatic timezone handling
- Built on NOAA solar and Meeus lunar algorithms
- Fully offline. No tracking. No account required.

WHAT IS GOLDEN HOUR?

Golden hour is the short window after sunrise and before sunset when the light turns soft, warm, and directional. Photographers chase it. Hikers love it. Solar Arc tells you exactly when it happens, wherever you are.

--

One purchase. No subscription. No ads.
Yours forever.

tr.description:
Astrea is a DICE-deck-building roguelike that flips the script on deckbuilders by using dice instead of cards and an unique dual “damage” system: Purification vs Corruption.

Features

• Unique dual “damage” system: Purification vs Corruption - In Astrea there is a new type of “damage” system. Purification can be used to damage enemies or heal yourself. On the other hand, corruption can be used to damage yourself or heal the enemies. Pacify enemies through Purification, or Corrupt yourself to unleash abilities that help tip the scales.
• Dynamic Health Bar system - With skills attached to your health bar, you can take Corruption to enable these skills and unleash powerful abilities. But be careful, if you take too much Corruption you will be consumed by it.
• Not cards, but dice! - Build a dice pool that fits your playstyle. Choose from over 350 dice and three dice types; reliably safe, perfectly balanced, or powerfully risky. A dice type system designed with high-risk, high-reward in its core.
• Customize your dice - Forge your fate by editing die faces with new actions, tipping the odds of powerful results into your favor.
• Choose from Six Brave Oracles - Each possessing their own unique dice sets, abilities, and playstyles. From ingenious spellcasters to brutish berserkers, whether you like beating the opponent into submission or outsmarting them with clever plays, there’s an oracle for you.
• Uncover over 170 modifying Blessings - Imbue your Oracle with unique passives yielding potent effects that changes up your fundamental tactics. Choose between Star Blessings, passive effects with lower power, or Black Hole Blessings, powerful passive effects with a drawback.

tr.description:
PowNap

Wake up when your body is ready.

PowNap is an intelligent power-nap timer for Apple Watch.

Instead of rigid time rules, PowNap uses your heart rate to detect recovery and wake you at the right moment.

You start the nap.
PowNap handles detection and wake-up — based on your current physiology.

---

Two Modes

Power Nap
15, 20, or 25 minutes.
- May end earlier if your body recovers sooner
- Ends at the selected time at the latest

Heart-rate detection with a fixed upper limit.

Infinity Nap
No time limit.
- Ends when your body shows signs of recovery or light sleep
- Ideal for stress, exhaustion, or when you don’t want a fixed duration

Not designed for deep sleep, but for short, measurable recovery.
Depending on your heart rate, this may happen after 10–15 minutes — or later.

---

Calm. Precise. Distraction-free.
- Detects relaxation and falling asleep via heart rate
- Wakes you with gentle vibration
- No countdown pressure, no unnecessary sound
- Subtle progress indicators instead of a classic timer
- Runs fully offline on your Apple Watch

Tap “Start” — PowNap takes care of the rest.

---

Adjustable (Optional)
- Vibration: Soft, Medium, Strong, or Increasing
- Heart-rate threshold:
- automatically adjusted to your resting heart rate
- or manually set as a percentage

Behavior may vary slightly depending on your daily condition.

---

Private & Local
- One-time purchase — no subscription
- No ads, no account, no tracking
- No cloud

All processing happens locally on your watch.
Saving naps to Apple Health is optional.

For heart-rate detection, Health permissions (Workout, Heart Rate, Sleep) are required.
Without them, heart-rate-based nap control is not available.

---

Important Notes
- PowNap is not a medical device
- For continuous heart-rate tracking, PowNap uses a “Mind & Body” workout session (required by watchOS)

As a result, exercise minutes are counted and Activity Rings are affected.
This behavior is system-controlled and cannot be undone.

---

Buy once.
No conditions.
Just calm, focused recovery.

---

Short FAQ

Why does PowNap start a workout?
- watchOS only allows continuous heart-rate tracking during an active workout.

Does PowNap fake activity or calories?
- No. All values come directly from watchOS.

Does PowNap affect Activity Rings?
- Yes, while the workout is active — this is system behavior.

Infinity = deep sleep?
- No. Infinity Nap is for short recovery, not deep or long sleep.

---

Apple Watch Compatibility

Requires Apple Watch Series 4 or newer (including SE).
Apple Watch Series 3 and earlier are not supported.

tr.description:
Golden hour happens every single day. Most people miss it. Solar Arc makes sure you do not.

- Chasing golden hour for a photo? Know the exact minute it starts.
- Planning a sunrise hike? See the best trail windows at a glance.
- Wondering when the moon rises tonight? It is right there on your screen.

SolarArc is a sun and moon tracker that feels like looking out the window. Every view shifts with the real sky — warm when the light is warm, dark when the sky is dark. It is not a data app you check. It is a sky app you feel.

ARC MODE 

The sun and moon traced across your sky in real time. Watch them rise, climb, and fall against a live gradient that shifts with the actual light outside your window. View the sun alone, the moon alone, or both together.

GRADIENT MODE

Your entire day, painted in one line. Dawn amber bleeds into midday blue, then sunset orange, then deep navy night. Golden hour glows. Blue hour cools. You do not need to read a single number — just look at the color and know where you are in the day.

LUNAR TRACKING

Know when to look up. SolarArc renders tonight's moon with the correct phase shape on the arc. Plan around full moons. Catch a crescent at dusk. Know exactly how dark the sky will be.

52-WEEK FORECAST

What will golden hour look like three Saturdays from now? How much daylight will you have on that hiking trip in April? Pick any date in the next year and see the full picture — sun, moon, and light — before you commit.

FIVE WAYS TO USE THE SKY

Photography — Golden hour and blue hour, down to the minute. Stop guessing when to shoot.
Hiking — Best trail windows and how much daylight is left. Know when to turn around.
Screens — A screen curfew that follows the sun. Wind down with the sky, not against it.
Gardening — When to water, when to protect, and how many sun hours your plants get today.
Stargazing — When true darkness begins. The best window to see everything above you.

FEATURES

- Live gradient line and arc visualizations
- Sun view, moon view, or dual view
- Golden hour and blue hour timing
- Moonrise, moonset, phase, and illumination
- 52-week forecast for any date
- Five activity modes
- Medium and large home screen widgets
- Notifications for sunrise, sunset, and golden hour
- Multi-location with automatic timezone handling
- Built on NOAA solar and Meeus lunar algorithms
- Fully offline. No tracking. No account required.

WHAT IS GOLDEN HOUR?

Golden hour is the short window after sunrise and before sunset when the light turns soft, warm, and directional. Photographers chase it. Hikers love it. Solar Arc tells you exactly when it happens, wherever you are.

--

One purchase. No subscription. No ads.
Yours forever.

Questions or ideas? hello@spruzzolabs.com

pt.description:
PowNap

Acorde quando o seu corpo estiver pronto.

PowNap é um temporizador inteligente de power nap para o Apple Watch.

Em vez de regras rígidas de tempo, o PowNap usa a sua frequência cardíaca para reconhecer a recuperação e acordar você no momento certo.

Você inicia o nap.
O PowNap cuida da detecção e do despertar — com base na sua fisiologia atual.

---

Dois modos

Power Nap
15, 20 ou 25 minutos.
- Pode terminar mais cedo se o seu corpo já estiver recuperado
- Termina no máximo no tempo selecionado

Detecção da frequência cardíaca com limite máximo fixo.

Infinity Nap
Sem limite de tempo.
- Termina assim que o corpo mostra sinais de recuperação ou sono leve
- Ideal para stress, exaustão ou quando não há uma duração definida

Não é destinado ao sono profundo, mas à recuperação curta e mensurável.
Dependendo da frequência cardíaca, isso pode acontecer após 10–15 minutos — ou mais tarde.

---

Calmo. Preciso. Sem distrações.
- Detecta relaxamento e início do sono pela frequência cardíaca
- Acorda você com uma vibração suave
- Sem pressão de contagem regressiva, sem sons desnecessários
- Indicadores de progresso discretos em vez de um temporizador clássico
- Funciona totalmente offline no Apple Watch

Toque em “Start” — o PowNap faz o resto.

---

Personalizável (opcional)
- Vibração: Soft, Medium, Strong ou Increasing
- Limite de frequência cardíaca:
- ajustado automaticamente à sua frequência de repouso
- ou definido manualmente como porcentagem

O comportamento pode variar levemente de um nap para outro.

---

Privado e local
- Compra única — sem assinatura
- Sem anúncios, sem conta, sem rastreamento
- Sem nuvem

Todo o processamento acontece localmente no seu relógio.
Salvar naps no Apple Health é opcional.

Para a detecção da frequência cardíaca, são necessárias permissões de Saúde (Treino, Frequência Cardíaca, Sono).
Sem essas permissões, o controle baseado na frequência cardíaca não funciona.

---

Informações importantes
- PowNap não é um dispositivo médico
- Para medição contínua da frequência cardíaca, o PowNap utiliza uma sessão de treino “Mind & Body” (exigência do watchOS)

Como resultado, minutos de exercício são contabilizados e os Anéis de Atividade são afetados.
Esse comportamento é controlado pelo sistema e não pode ser revertido.

---

Compre uma vez.
Sem condições.
Apenas recuperação calma e focada.

---

FAQ curto

Por que um treino?
- O watchOS permite medição contínua da frequência cardíaca apenas durante um treino ativo.

O PowNap falsifica atividade ou calorias?
- Não. Todos os valores vêm diretamente do watchOS.

O PowNap afeta os Anéis de Atividade?
- Sim, enquanto o treino estiver ativo — comportamento do sistema.

Infinity = sono profundo?
- Não. O Infinity Nap é para recuperação curta, não para sono profundo ou prolongado.

---

Compatibilidade Apple Watch

Requer Apple Watch Series 4 ou mais recente (incluindo SE).
Apple Watch Series 3 e anteriores não são compatíveis.

pt.description:
Golden hour happens every single day. Most people miss it. Solar Arc makes sure you do not.

- Chasing golden hour for a photo? Know the exact minute it starts.
- Planning a sunrise hike? See the best trail windows at a glance.
- Wondering when the moon rises tonight? It is right there on your screen.

SolarArc is a sun and moon tracker that feels like looking out the window. Every view shifts with the real sky — warm when the light is warm, dark when the sky is dark. It is not a data app you check. It is a sky app you feel.

ARC MODE 

The sun and moon traced across your sky in real time. Watch them rise, climb, and fall against a live gradient that shifts with the actual light outside your window. View the sun alone, the moon alone, or both together.

GRADIENT MODE

Your entire day, painted in one line. Dawn amber bleeds into midday blue, then sunset orange, then deep navy night. Golden hour glows. Blue hour cools. You do not need to read a single number — just look at the color and know where you are in the day.

LUNAR TRACKING

Know when to look up. SolarArc renders tonight's moon with the correct phase shape on the arc. Plan around full moons. Catch a crescent at dusk. Know exactly how dark the sky will be.

52-WEEK FORECAST

What will golden hour look like three Saturdays from now? How much daylight will you have on that hiking trip in April? Pick any date in the next year and see the full picture — sun, moon, and light — before you commit.

FIVE WAYS TO USE THE SKY

Photography — Golden hour and blue hour, down to the minute. Stop guessing when to shoot.
Hiking — Best trail windows and how much daylight is left. Know when to turn around.
Screens — A screen curfew that follows the sun. Wind down with the sky, not against it.
Gardening — When to water, when to protect, and how many sun hours your plants get today.
Stargazing — When true darkness begins. The best window to see everything above you.

FEATURES

- Live gradient line and arc visualizations
- Sun view, moon view, or dual view
- Golden hour and blue hour timing
- Moonrise, moonset, phase, and illumination
- 52-week forecast for any date
- Five activity modes
- Medium and large home screen widgets
- Notifications for sunrise, sunset, and golden hour
- Multi-location with automatic timezone handling
- Built on NOAA solar and Meeus lunar algorithms
- Fully offline. No tracking. No account required.

WHAT IS GOLDEN HOUR?

Golden hour is the short window after sunrise and before sunset when the light turns soft, warm, and directional. Photographers chase it. Hikers love it. Solar Arc tells you exactly when it happens, wherever you are.

--

One purchase. No subscription. No ads.
Yours forever.

Questions or ideas? hello@spruzzolabs.com

pt.description:
"Se quiser desvendar os segredos do universo, pense em termos de energia, frequência e vibração."
-Nikola Tesla

PRINCIPAIS FUNCIONALIDADES:

- Monitorize a ressonância Schumann da Terra e o clima espacial numa só app
- Widgets personalizáveis para Ecrã Principal, Ecrã Bloqueado e Centro de Controlo
- Previsão de aurora em tempo real com mapa completo
- Dados em direto: leituras numéricas em tempo real para harmónicos de Schumann, índice Kp, vento solar e GCP, com gráficos de tendência das últimas 24 horas (EarthBeat Pro)
- Análise avançada de “bursts” e notificações (EarthBeat Pro)
- Análise da Leitura Atual, científica e espiritual, com 100-250 palavras a cada três horas (EarthBeat Pro)
- Resumo semanal de Tomsk com partilha e arquivo (EarthBeat Pro)
- Cartão de Partilha: partilhe um cartão social da situação atual do EarthBeat em tema escuro ou claro (Pro: todos os idiomas suportados)

O “batimento cardíaco” da Terra, a ressonância Schumann, é gerado por cerca de 2 000 trovoadas que produzem aproximadamente 50 relâmpagos por segundo. Estes criam ondas eletromagnéticas que circulam o planeta. Muitos observam ligações entre esta ressonância e a consciência coletiva humana, notando mudanças de comportamento durante períodos de atividade intensa.

O EarthBeat acompanha a ressonância Schumann, mostra índices de clima espacial como o índice Kp, vento solar e fluxo de raios X, e integra dados em tempo real do Global Consciousness Project (GCP). O GCP é exibido como um indicador 3D colorido que reflete padrões de consciência global.

Desenvolvido para iOS 17 e posteriores, o EarthBeat oferece widgets em vários tamanhos. Os widgets de Tomsk e Cumiana mostram as medições atuais, o Gráfico Tomsk Completo apresenta o histórico de três dias e o Widget de Previsão cobre quatro frequências. Os Widgets de Aurora preveem a atividade das luzes do norte, as Imagens Solares em Direto mostram seis feeds da NASA para vigiar erupções solares e o Widget Ponto GCP exibe padrões de consciência.

As novidades incluem Dados Tomsk Melhorados com Fator de Qualidade, Fundo Eletromagnético e previsões de frequência; Vista Completa do Mapa de Aurora; e Previsão de Absorção na Região D. Toque em qualquer gráfico para vê-lo em ecrã inteiro com zoom por gesto de pinça.

Os subscritores do EarthBeat Pro recebem leituras numéricas em direto com gráficos de tendência de 24 horas, análise avançada de “bursts” de Tomsk (10/30/60 minutos), notificações personalizadas, resumo semanal da Schumann com partilha e arquivo de 10 semanas para acompanhar padrões. A sua subscrição apoia a infraestrutura de servidores e o desenvolvimento contínuo.

Compare medições do Tomsk Space Observing System e da Cumiana VLF Station enquanto explora os padrões do Global Consciousness Project. Informação detalhada aprofunda a compreensão destas áreas de investigação.

Agora disponível em 9 idiomas, incluindo Chinês Simplificado, Japonês e Russo.

Se gostaria de ver fontes de dados adicionais ou tem ideias para widgets, entre em contacto.

Todas as imagens exibidas são protegidas por direitos de autor e pertencem às respetivas fontes indicadas na app.
